contact_lookup_status: Named contact Cathérine Krumm from the Recruiting Team was visible on the public JOIN posting checked on 2026-04-12.
job_title: Werkstudent (m/w/d) Corporate Innovation Services | ab 15.04.2026, 15-20 h
availability_override: I am available to start from 15 April 2026 and can work between 15 and 20 hours per week in line with my current student visa.
why_company: What caught my attention about NXTGN is that this role sits exactly where structured business work, startup energy, and practical innovation support meet. I am especially drawn to work where ideas are not left at the strategy level, but translated into matching processes, workshop material, and clearer decision support for real companies.
job_description: NXTGN Management GmbH is hiring a Working Student in Corporate Innovation Services in Stuttgart on a hybrid basis. The role supports venture partnering projects from problem definition to startup matching, quality assurance and structured preparation of startup information for corporate members, creation of presentations, one-pagers, and Miro boards for workshops and meetings, support for the design and execution of matching formats between startups and companies, and support for startup scouting processes including workshops and maintenance of the dealflow database. The posting asks for ongoing studies in business administration, innovation management, industrial engineering, or a similar field, interest in startups, innovation, and new technologies, self-driven and goal-oriented work, strong PowerPoint skills, ability to grasp complex content and prepare it clearly, and ideally first experience in corporate innovation management or startup environments.
requirements: Ongoing studies in business administration, innovation management, industrial engineering, or a similar field
Interest in startups, innovation, and new technologies
Independent and goal-oriented working style with strong initiative
Ability to understand complex content and prepare it clearly
High quality awareness and attention to detail
Ideally first experience in corporate innovation management or startup environments
cv_about_override: Business analysis, product delivery, and AI workflow professional focused on structured communication, workshop support, and turning complex innovation topics into clearer operational next steps.
cv_summary_override: Experienced business analysis and product professional with a strong foundation in structured execution, stakeholder alignment, workflow improvement, and practical communication across technical and non-technical contexts. Alongside my earlier product and business-analysis work, I have also built a stronger profile in AI workflows, automation, and startup-oriented technology thinking. This makes me well suited for working student roles that combine corporate innovation support, startup matching, structured research, workshop preparation, and practical coordination between different stakeholders.
cover_letter_opening: I wanted to apply for the Werkstudent (m/w/d) Corporate Innovation Services role at NXTGN because the work itself caught my attention immediately. It sits exactly in the part of innovation work I find most meaningful: turning broad ideas into clearer matching processes, workshop material, and structured support for real collaboration between startups and companies.
cover_letter_body_one: My background has made me comfortable in roles where structure, communication, and practical follow-through matter at least as much as the original idea. Across digital products and operations-heavy environments, I have often worked on clarifying problems, preparing decision-ready material, improving workflows, and helping different stakeholders move from discussion to execution.
cover_letter_body_two: What makes this role especially relevant for me is the combination of startup-facing work, workshop support, and structured information preparation. Through my work across marketplace products, regulated onboarding, healthcare workflow digitization, and my public writing about AI and technology trends on pmlecuong.com, I have built a stronger ability to understand complex topics quickly and turn them into clearer materials that others can use. That feels closely aligned with venture partnering, startup scouting, one-pagers, presentations, and matching formats at NXTGN.
cover_letter_motivation: I am particularly interested in NXTGN because the company connects established businesses, startups, and applied innovation work in a very practical regional ecosystem. That is exactly the kind of environment where I believe structured support, curiosity, and strong preparation can create visible value.
cover_letter_closing: I am available to start from 15 April 2026 and can work between 15 and 20 hours per week in line with my current student visa. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can support your Corporate Innovation Services team.
